items.prompt: After this course you should be able to…
choices: Run lint, C++ host sim, trace, and read basic metrics
Skip compile and only view blank waves
Ignore escapes if pass rate is fifty percent

items.prompt: A sensible sibling course for event-delay teaching is…
If you mostly did browser labs, a good wrap action is…
choices: Reproduce one compile-run-trace cycle in Track A

items.prompt: Minimal public markers and active dump calls are lasting Verilator engineering habits.
items.explain: Exposure discipline and trace pairing stick.
